headline: Pultegroup Inc (PHM) CFO Draws Attention To Company’s Efficient Cash Allocation
summary: Pultegroup Inc (NYSE:PHM) is among the best homebuilder stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On March 2, PulteGroup (NYSE:PHM) outlined its strategic priorities during the 47th Annual Raymond James Institutional Investor Conference. At that event, Jim Ossowski, the CFO of PulteGroup, focused on strategic land management. He took the opportunity to highlight how Pultegroup […]
